## What

<!-- The high-level description in mathematical terms: which definition,
construction or law does this add? Per CONTRIBUTING.md this part must be
written by a human or quote a human's prompt verbatim. -->

## Changes

<!-- The detailed list of changes. This part may be LLM-generated. -->

-

## Checklist

- [ ] The change was described in high-level mathematical terms, and this description aligns with the data structures used
- [ ] I have reported any bugs or confusing docs I encountered, even if unrelated
- [ ] I have added docs and tests that are complete but concise
- [ ] `uv run pflake8 discopy` and `uv run coverage run -m pytest` then `uv run coverage report -m` all pass
- [ ] I have respected the [code style guide](../../CONTRIBUTING.md#code-style-guide)
- [ ] Any contribution from a large language model is explicitly indicated as such
